LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HIDETO MATSUSHIMA DEMURRER TO THE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO STATE FACTS THAT DEMONSTRATE DILIGENCE TO DISCOVER DEFENDANT'S TRUE IDENTITY. NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HIDETO MATSUSHIMA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST SPECIFY WHY SHE DID NOT LEARN OF DEFENDANT'S IDENTITY EARLIER. THERE IS NO SHOWING OF DILIGENCE WHY PLAINTIFF DID NOT ATTEMPT TO DISCOVER DEFENDANT'S TRUE NAME IN 2007-2008. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HIDETO MATSUSHIMA DEMURRER TO THE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances:
Tokiko Yasuda and Edward Miyauchi of Marshall Suzuki Law Group, LLP (618.0090) appearing for defendant and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to state facts that demonstrate diligence to discover defendant's true identity. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HIDETO MATSUSHIMA DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff must state facts that demonstrate diligence to discover defendant's true identity. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Continued To Feb-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HIDETO MATSUSHIMA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Tokiko Yasuda, Esq. of Marshall Suzuki Law Group LLP (415) 618-0090 appearing for Defendant and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff must specify why she did not learn of defendant's identity earlier. There is no showing of diligence why plaintiff did not attempt to discover defendant's true name in 2007-2008. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
